hero.title: Jose Miss builds frontend and CMS experiences with a clear business focus.
hero.summary: Frontend & CMS Developer based in Mexico, open to USA and LATAM remote work. Specialized in Vue.js, Nuxt.js, WordPress, and Shopify with a strong focus on performance, technical SEO, and conversion-minded execution.

intro.title: A practical builder with design sensitivity and product awareness.
paragraphs: My work sits between frontend engineering, CMS implementation, and conversion-focused execution. I build the interface layer, adapt platforms to business needs, and keep performance and maintainability in view from the start.
A background in Graphic Design helps me collaborate closely with design teams and translate visual direction into production-ready UI. That balance is useful when projects need both polish and speed.

principles.title: Build for clarity
principles.description: Interfaces should feel clean, predictable, and easy to maintain, not just visually appealing.

principles.title: Optimize what matters
principles.description: Performance, SEO structure, and conversion surfaces are part of the implementation, not post-launch extras.

principles.title: Work well remotely
principles.description: I am used to collaborating with distributed teams across USA and LATAM using async-friendly workflows and clear handoffs.

valueBlocks.title: Vue.js and Nuxt.js interfaces
valueBlocks.description: Custom frontend work for marketing sites, product experiences, and content-heavy builds that need structure, responsiveness, and maintainable code.

valueBlocks.title: WordPress and Shopify delivery
valueBlocks.description: Theme customization, from-scratch builds, builder-based implementations, and third-party integrations aligned to content and commerce workflows.

valueBlocks.title: Performance, SEO, and conversion support
valueBlocks.description: Core Web Vitals improvements, technical SEO foundations, analytics tooling, and UX adjustments that support acquisition and conversion goals.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.subtitle: LinkGraph
experience.description: Working across Shopify and WordPress delivery for marketing-driven websites and eCommerce implementations.
points: Customize Shopify stores with theme work and third-party app integrations.
Build and maintain WordPress sites using custom development and page builders.
Improve SEO structure, performance, and conversion-oriented user flows.
Collaborate with remote marketing and development teams.

experience.title: Freelance Web Developer
experience.subtitle: Honey Mustard
experience.description: Supporting product and marketing initiatives with a mix of custom frontend development and CMS delivery.
points: Built custom frontend applications with Vue.js and Nuxt.js.
Developed WordPress and Shopify websites from scratch.
Improved UI/UX quality and overall website performance.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.subtitle: DUDE Agency
experience.description: Delivered custom WordPress implementations for multiple client accounts with ongoing support responsibilities.
points: Developed custom WordPress websites for different business contexts.
Handled theme customization and plugin integrations.
Maintained and improved live sites over time.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.subtitle: CEGA Security, Maya Solar, and Kemix Quimica
experience.description: Early in-house work focused on WordPress development, maintenance, and the operational side of keeping business sites healthy.
points: Delivered WordPress website development and maintenance.
Built the technical foundation for later CMS and frontend specialization.

stack.title: Frontend
stack.description: Core technologies used to build responsive interfaces and custom UI implementations.

stack.title: CMS & eCommerce
stack.description: Platforms where I usually translate business and content requirements into live sites.

stack.title: Performance & SEO
stack.description: Technical work that improves discoverability, speed, and operational visibility.

stack.title: Collaboration & Delivery
stack.description: Tools that support shipping, coordination, hosting, and design handoff.

differentiators.title: Design and development are connected
differentiators.description: A Graphic Design degree makes it easier to interpret layouts, collaborate with designers, and ship UI with fewer translation gaps.

differentiators.title: Remote-ready collaboration
differentiators.description: I am comfortable working with distributed teams, clear feedback loops, and project management systems that keep progress visible.

differentiators.title: Performance is part of the build
differentiators.description: Optimization, structure, and clean implementation are treated as baseline quality, not a later patch.

differentiators.title: Digital work aligned to business goals
differentiators.description: I focus on websites and stores that support marketing, commerce, and operational goals instead of shipping features in isolation.

education.title: Education and continuous growth
education.summary: Bachelor in Graphic Design from TecMilenio (2019). That foundation continues to shape how I approach interface detail, hierarchy, and collaboration with design teams.

contact.title: Need a frontend or CMS partner who can move from idea to launch?
contact.description: I can support custom frontend work, WordPress or Shopify delivery, and optimization efforts for teams that value clean execution and reliable collaboration.
